'''ngathovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickings|nickings]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-th-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickings|nickings]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngathovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngætheveth|ngætheveth]] || [[word:ngæthevej|ngæthevej]] || [[word:ngæthevesh|ngæthevesh]] || [[word:ngætheve|ngætheve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngathothovoth|ngathothovoth]] || [[word:ngathothovoj|ngathothovoj]] || [[word:ngathothovosh|ngathothovosh]] || [[word:ngathothovo|ngathothovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngathovoth|ngathovoth]] || [[word:ngathovoj|ngathovoj]] || [[word:ngathovosh|ngathovosh]] || [[word:ngathovo|ngathovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngathofvoth|ngathofvoth]] || [[word:ngathofvoj|ngathofvoj]] || [[word:ngathofvosh|ngathofvosh]] || [[word:ngathofvof|ngathofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngathovotho|ngathovotho]] || [[word:ngathovojo|ngathovojo]] || [[word:ngathovosho|ngathovosho]] || [[word:ngathovoko|ngathovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngathovoth|ngathovoth]] || [[word:ngathovoj|ngathovoj]] || [[word:ngathovosh|ngathovosh]] || [[word:ngathovo|ngathovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngathovothol|ngathovothol]] || [[word:ngathovojol|ngathovojol]] || [[word:ngathovoshol|ngathovoshol]] || [[word:ngathovokol|ngathovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngathovothotho|ngathovothotho]] || [[word:ngathovojojo|ngathovojojo]] || [[word:ngathovoshosho|ngathovoshosho]] || [[word:ngathovoko|ngathovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngathovothon|ngathovothon]] || [[word:ngathovojon|ngathovojon]] || [[word:ngathovoshon|ngathovoshon]] || [[word:ngathovokon|ngathovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngathovothoro|ngathovothoro]] || [[word:ngathovojoro|ngathovojoro]] || [[word:ngathovoshoro|ngathovoshoro]] || [[word:ngathovokoro|ngathovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
